name: show_line_chart
description: Display trends over time. Use metric 'balance' for account balance, 'net_cash_flow' for income vs spending, 'income' or 'spending' for individual trends

metric.description: What data to show on the line chart.

time_range.description: The time period to display data for.

title.description: Chart title that describes the visualization.

name: show_pie_chart
description: Display spending or income breakdown by category. Set data_type to 'income' for income, 'spending' for expenses

data_type.description: Whether to show spending (expenses) or income

group_by.description: How to group the data in the pie chart

limit.description: Max items to show. Remaining items grouped into 'Other'.

filter_by.description: Filter type: 'category' to filter by categories, 'payee' to filter by payees.

filter_values.description: List of category or payee names to include (based on filter_by).

name: show_stacked_bar_chart
description: Display spending or income trends over time by category. Set data_type to 'income' for income, 'spending' for expenses

data_type.description: Whether to show spending or income data.

time_granularity.description: How to aggregate data: 'total' for summed, 'monthly' for month-by-month bars.

limit.description: Max items to show. Remaining items grouped into 'Other'.

filter_categories.description: List of category names to include (omit for all).

filter_payees.description: List of payee names to include (omit for all).

title.description: Chart title that describes the visualization.
